approvalRules: Any new or changed clinical, diagnostic, PPE, isolation, treatment, or triage-card text requires human approval.
Any automatic signal creation or update above watch requires human approval.
Any Embassy/State-only claim can create an operational candidate but cannot write epidemiologic case/death counts.
Any unsupported case-count change stages for approval until corroborated by WHO, CDC, MOH, FDA, or Africa CDC as appropriate.
Tier 3 media can suggest candidates only; it cannot write structured signal facts.

sourceCurrencyMatrix.sourceCurrencyAction: manual review required before changing structured facts, geography, summaries, sections, or source attribution
sourceCurrencyMatrix.notes: ECDC/WHO/CDC prose and guidance pages; complex travel/contact geography stays human-led.

sourceCurrencyMatrix.sourceCurrencyAction: manual review required before changing structured facts, geography, summaries, sections, or source attribution

sourceCurrencyMatrix.sourceCurrencyAction: auto-check source currency and stage proposed changes for human review; do not write structured facts unattended
sourceCurrencyMatrix.notes: CDC static surveillance page can be checked automatically; case-count writes remain human-reviewed until a deterministic parser is approved.
